brief: Transform deprecated gen_ai.response.text and gen_ai.response.tool_calls values into the newer gen_ai.output.messages format.

inputs.brief: Deprecated response text attribute to transform into assistant text parts.
Deprecated response tool calls attribute to transform into assistant tool call parts.

actions: If gen_ai.output.messages is already present, keep it and do not overwrite it.
Read gen_ai.response.text as either a plain string or a JSON-encoded value.
If gen_ai.response.text is a plain string, convert it to an assistant text part.
If gen_ai.response.text is a JSON string, convert it to an assistant text part.

If gen_ai.response.text is a JSON object with a content field, convert that content to assistant text parts and ignore response-message metadata fields such as role, tool_calls, function_call, provider_specific_fields, and annotations.
If gen_ai.response.text is a JSON array, convert string items and object items with a content field to assistant text parts.
Read gen_ai.response.tool_calls as a JSON array and convert each object to a part with type="tool_call".
Combine text and tool call parts into one assistant message.
Write the transformed assistant message array to gen_ai.output.messages.
Remove gen_ai.response.text and gen_ai.response.tool_calls once the deprecated attributes are normalized.
